---
title: "Surface Comparison"
---

# Surface Comparison

This comparison keeps project-owned model transcripts separate from repository-owned deterministic tooling. It does not count local deterministic graders as independent external adoption.

## Field-Spell Matrix

| Case                                                  | Surface                    | Weak/Repaired Delta                                           | Execution Signal                                     | Limitation                                                                                          |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Refactor Without Breaking Behavior                    | claude-code-safe           | repaired prompts satisfied 0.5 more outcome checks on average | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Refactor Without Breaking Behavior                    | codex-cli-default          | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Refactor Without Breaking Behavior                    | local-deterministic-grader | repaired artifact passes where weak artifact fails            | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |
| Incident Diagnosis Without Fake Certainty             | claude-code-safe           | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Incident Diagnosis Without Fake Certainty             | codex-cli-default          | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Incident Diagnosis Without Fake Certainty             | local-deterministic-grader | execution delta pending                                       | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |
| API Design Without Hidden Compatibility Traps         | claude-code-safe           | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| API Design Without Hidden Compatibility Traps         | codex-cli-default          | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| API Design Without Hidden Compatibility Traps         | local-deterministic-grader | execution delta pending                                       | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |
| Online Migration Without Data Loss                    | claude-code-safe           | repaired prompts satisfied 0.5 more outcome checks on average | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Online Migration Without Data Loss                    | codex-cli-default          | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Online Migration Without Data Loss                    | local-deterministic-grader | execution delta pending                                       | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |
| Test Generation Without Overfitting To Implementation | claude-code-safe           | repaired prompts satisfied 1.0 more outcome checks on average | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Test Generation Without Overfitting To Implementation | codex-cli-default          | repaired prompts satisfied 0.3 more outcome checks on average | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Test Generation Without Overfitting To Implementation | local-deterministic-grader | execution delta pending                                       | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |
| Performance Tuning Without Micro-Optimization Drift   | claude-code-safe           | repaired prompts satisfied 1.5 more outcome checks on average | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Performance Tuning Without Micro-Optimization Drift   | codex-cli-default          | weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks              | recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring      | model-surface evidence for the named local CLI/tool configuration; marker scoring remains secondary |
| Performance Tuning Without Micro-Optimization Drift   | local-deterministic-grader | execution delta pending                                       | fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists | repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence                         |

Raw comparison data: [surface-comparison.json](../examples/evaluations/surface-comparison.json)
